children.name: hwBleProfileTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWidsWhitelistProfileMacTable
children.description: This table is used to configure WIDS MAC whitelists.

children.name: hwWlanLoadBalanceStaticGroupMemberTable
children.description: This table records information about members in the static load balancing group.

children.name: hwSACProfileActionTable
children.description: This table describes SAC profile action configurations.This table is used to configure actions in an SAC profile.

children.name: hwWdsWhitelistTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWdsWhitelistProfileTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWdsWhitelistProfileEntry
children.description: Description.

children.name: hw5gRadioProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure 5 GHz radio parameters, including physical radio parameters such as channel, power, antenna gain, and working mode, and bind air scan profiles and RRM profiles.

children.name: hwIoTProfileManagementServerTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWiredPortProfileTrafficFilterTable
children.description: This table is used to configure QoS filter information.

children.name: hwAPGroupCardTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwAPSpecificCardTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwAPSpecificRadioTable
children.description: This table records the information about profiles bound based on radio in an AP specific profile, including 5G radio profile, Mesh profile, WDS profile, WIDS profile, location profile, and spectrum profile.

children.name: hwAPSpecificWiredPortTable
children.description: This table is used to bind an AP wired port profile to an AP specific profile or unbind an AP wired port profile from an AP specific profile..

children.name: hwOperatorClassProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure operating class profile parameters.

children.name: hwWlanLanguageCodeTable
children.description: It is the language code table. It complies with ISO 639 and is used by hotspot networks to obtain language code information.

children.name: hwWlanLanguageCodeEntry
children.description: The index of this table is hwWlanLanguageCode.

children.name: hwWlanMeshProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure and query Mesh profile parameters.

children.name: hwWlanMeshProfileEntry
children.description: The index of this table is hwWlanMeshProfileName.

children.name: hwWlanMeshClientEdcaVideoECWmin
children.description: This object indicates the exponent form of the minimum contention window (ECWmin) for AC_VI packets. ECWmin and ECWmax determine the average backoff time.

children.name: hwWlanMeshClientEdcaBkAIFSN
children.description: This object indicates the AIFSN for AC_BK packets,  which determines the channel idle time.

children.name: hwWlanMeshProfileBeacon6gRate
children.description: This object indicates the mesh 6G beacon rate. The default value is 6.

children.name: hwWlanMeshClientEdcaBkECWmax
children.description: This object indicates the exponent form of the maximum contention window (ECWmax) for AC_BK packets. ECWmin and ECWmax determine the average backoff time.

children.name: hwWlanMeshProfilePriorityMapTrustMode
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWlanMeshFwaEdcaMode
children.description: This object indicates the EDCA mode in FWA mode. The default value is 1.

children.name: hwWlanMeshClientEdcaBeECWmin
children.description: This object indicates the exponent form of the minimum contention window (ECWmin) for AC_BE packets. ECWmin and ECWmax determine the average backoff time.

children.name: hwIDIndexedAPSpecificRadioTable
children.description: This table records the information about profiles bound based on radio in an AP specific profile, including 5G radio profile, Mesh profile, WDS profile, WIDS profile, location profile, and spectrum profile.

children.name: hwAirScanProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure air scan intervals, duration, and scan channel sets.

children.name: hwAirScanProfileEntry
children.description: The index of this table is hwAirScanProfileName.

children.name: hwVapSIpFpmApplicationTable
children.description: This table is used to configure sipfpm application.

children.name: hwVapSIpFpmApplicationEntry
children.description: Description

children.name: hwVapSIpFpmApplicationUserGroupName
children.description: This object indicates the sipfpm user group name.

children.name: hwAPSpecificTable
children.description: This table is used to create or delete an AP specific profile and bind an AP system profile, 2G radio profile, or domain profile to it or unbind an AP system profile, 2G radio profile, or domain profile from it.

children.name: hwAPSpecificEntry
children.description: The index of this table is hwAPSpApMac.

children.name: hwAPSpAPSystemProfile
children.description: This object indicates the system profile bound to the AP specific profile.

children.name: hwAPSpLatitude
children.description: This object indicates the latitude.

children.name: hwRoamingConsortiumProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure and query roaming consortium profile parameters.

children.name: hwSysWmiConfigTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwAPWiredPortProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to create or delete an AP wired port link profile and modify or query attributes.

children.name: hwWlanIDIndexedAPSpecificTable
children.description: This table is used to create or delete an AP specific profile and bind an AP system profile, 2G radio profile, or domain profile to it or unbind an AP system profile, 2G radio profile, or domain profile from it.

children.name: hwIDIndexedAPSpecificWiredPortTable
children.description: This table is used to bind an AP wired port profile to an AP specific profile or unbind an AP wired port profile from an AP specific profile..

children.name: hwSecurityProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to describe the information of a security profile.

children.name: hwSsidProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure and query SSID profile parameters.

children.name: hwSsidProfileEntry
children.description: The index of this table is hwSsidProfileName.

children.name: hwSsidErSuSwitch
children.description: This object indicates the switch of ER SU, The default value is 2.

children.name: hwSsidClientEdcaVideoAIFSN
children.description: This object indicates the AIFSN value, which determines the idle waiting time. The value of this object is the AIFSN value of the AC_VI queue on the station. The default value is 2. In V200R019C10 and later versions, 1 is not supported and will switch to 2 automatically.

children.name: hwSsidClientEdcaBeECWmax
children.description: This object indicates the ECWmax value, which determines the average avoidance time. The value of this object is the ECWmax value of the AC_BE queue on the station. The default value is 10.

children.name: hwSsidInboundCarPir
children.description: This object indicates the inbound peak information rate (PIR) of the SSID. The default value is 0 kbit/s. Invalid value is 1 to 63.

children.name: hwSsidClientEdcaVoiceTXOPLimit
children.description: This object indicates the TXOPLimit value, which determines the time for occupying the channel. The value of this object is the TXOPLimit value of the AC_VO queue on the station. The default value is 47.

children.name: hwSACProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure and query SAC profile parameters.

children.name: hwAPTrafficProfileFilterTable
children.description: This table is used to configure QoS filter information.

children.name: hwAPTrafficProfileFilterEntry
children.description: The indexes of this table are hwAPTrafficProfileName, hwAPTrafficProfileFilterType, and hwAPTrafficProfileFilterDirection.

children.name: hwVapProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure and query VAP profile parameters.

children.name: hwAPGroupWiredPortTable
children.description: This table is the AP wired port profile table.This table is used to bind a wired port profile to an AP group or unbind a wired port profile from an AP group.

children.name: hwOperatorDomainNameProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure and query operator domain profile parameters.

children.name: hwWlanCountryChannelTable
children.description: This table is used to get country channel.

children.name: hwWlanCountryChannelEntry
children.description: Description

children.name: hwWlanCountryChannelBandwidth
children.description: This object indicates the chanenl bandwidth.

children.name: hwWlanRadioCalibrateManualProcess
children.description: This object indicates the radio calibration status

children.name: hwWlanRadioCalibrateAutoStartTime
children.description:
This object indicates the start time of automatic radio calibration.
				The default value is 03:00:00.

children.name: hwWlanRadioCalibrateManualApGroup
children.description:
This object indicates the manually triggered radio calibration based on the AP group. 
				It is valid only when the radio calibration mode is manual.

children.name: hwWlanRadioCalibrateEnvironmentDeteriorateValue
children.description: This object indicates the environment deterioration threshold function. The default value is 16.

children.name: hwWlanRadioCalibrateScheduleTimeRange
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWlanRadioCalibrateSensitivityCustomValue
children.description: This object indicates the custom threshold of calibrate sensitivity. It can be set when hwWlanRadioCalibrateSensitivity is custom(5). A larger value indicates lower calibration sensitivity.

children.name: hwBranchGroupTable
children.description: This table is used to configure branch group information.

children.name: hwWlanMeshWhitelistProfileConfigTable
children.description: This table describes Mesh whitelists in the Mesh whitelist profile.

children.name: hwVapSIpFpmFlowTable
children.description: This table is used to configure Station Connectivity Detect Mac.

children.name: hwWidsSpoofProfileListTable
children.description: This table is used to create or delete WIDS spoof SSID profiles.

children.name: hwWidsSpoofProfileListEntry
children.description: The index of this table is hwWidsSpoofProfileListProfileName.

children.name: hwVapServiceExpAnalysisUserGroupAppTable
children.description: This table is used to configure monitor application and user group.

children.name: hwVapServiceExpAnalysisUserGroupAppEntry
children.description: The indexes of this table is hwVapProfileName and hwVapServiceExpAnalysisUserGroupAppIndex.

children.name: hwWidsWhitelistProfileListTable
children.description: This table is used to create or delete WIDS confident profiles.

children.name: hwVapSIpFpmFlowAutoDetectTable
children.description: This table is used to configure sipfpm flow auto detect.

children.name: hwVapAntiAttackUserDefFloodTable
children.description: This table describes SAC profile action configurations.This table is used to configure actions in an SAC profile.

children.name: hwTrafficProfileTrafficFilterTable
children.description: This table is used to configure QoS filter information.

children.name: hwWmiProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to get and set the wmi server profile attributes.

children.name: hwWmiProfileEntry
children.description: The indexes of this table is hwWmiServerProfileName.

children.name: hwWmiBackupServerIPv4
children.description: This object indicates the backup server IPv4 address attribute of this wmi server profile.

children.name: hwWmiReportInterval
children.description: This object indicates the report interval attribute of this wmi server profile. The default report interval is 60s.

children.name: hwWmiLogModuleist
children.description: This object indicates the log module list. For example, ff5a0000,ff630000,ffd10000. Setting this object to 0 indicates the deletion operation.

children.name: hwWmiNeighborDataInterval
children.description: This object indicates the neighbor date collecting interval attribute of this wmi server profile. The default collecting interval is 60s.

children.name: hwWmiRadioDataInterval
children.description: This object indicates the radio date collecting interval attribute of this wmi server profile. The default collecting interval is 10s.

children.name: hwWmiTerminalDhcpOptionDataInterval
children.description: This object indicates the terminal Dhcp Option date collecting interval attribute of this wmi server profile. The default collecting interval is 300s.

children.name: hwWmiServerProfileName
children.description: This object indicates the wmi server profile name.

children.name: hwWmiLldpDataSwitch
children.description: This object indicates the lldp neighbor data collecting switch attribute of this wmi server profile.

children.name: hwWmiServerPort
children.description: This object indicates the server port number attribute of this wmi server profile.

children.name: hwWmiApplicationStatisticsDataInterval
children.description: Configure the WMI application statistics data report interval, the default collecting interval is 300s

children.name: hwWmiTerminalMdnsDataInterval
children.description: This object indicates the terminal Mdns date collecting interval attribute of this wmi server profile. The default collecting interval is 300s.

children.name: hwWmiSecurityDataInterval
children.description: This object indicates the wids date collecting interval attribute of this wmi server profile. The default collecting interval is 300s.

children.name: hwWmiDnsDataInterval
children.description: This object indicates the dns collecting interval attribute of this wmi server profile. The default collecting interval is 60s.

children.name: hwWmiSIpfpmSwitch
children.description: This object indicates the S-Ipfpm date collecting switch attribute of this wmi server profile.

children.name: hwWmiRetryConnectionCnt
children.description: This object indicates the retry connection times attribute of this wmi server profile. The default retry times is 0, which means it will alway trys to reconnect.

children.name: hwLocationProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure terminal location and tag location.

children.name: hwAPGroupRadioTable
children.description: This table is used to bind a 5G radio profile, Mesh profile, WDS profile, WIDS profile, location profile, or spectrum profile to an AP group or unbind a 5G radio profile, Mesh profile, WDS profile, WIDS profile, location profile, or spectrum profile from an AP group..

children.name: hwAPGroupRadioEntry
children.description: Indexes of this table are hwAPGroupName and hwAPGrpRadioId.

children.name: hwAPGrpSfnRoamBeaconSwitch
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwAPGrpRadioId
children.description: This object indicates the radio ID. It is the index of the table.

children.name: hwAPGrpAutoBandwidthSelectSwitch
children.description: This object indicates the status of the automatic bandwidth selection function. The default value is 1.

children.name: hwAPGrpRadioFrequency
children.description: This object indicates the setting of the frequency band for radio 0. The default value is 1. 1: frequency2G, 2: frequency5G, 3: frequency6G.

children.name: hwAPGrpRadio2gProfile
children.description: This object indicates the 2G radio profile to which AP groups are bound. The default value is default.

children.name: hwVAPProfileAntiAttackTable
children.description: This table is used to configure vap anti-attack information.

children.name: hwVAPProfileAntiAttackEntry
children.description: The indexes of this table are hwVapProfileName, hwVAPProfileAntiAttackPacketType

children.name: hwVAPProfileAntiAttackPacketType
children.description: This object indicates the packet type of the VAP anti-attack flood function.This parameter has no default value.

children.name: hwVAPProfileAntiAttackStaRateThreshold
children.description: This object indicates the anti-attack flood sta-rate-threshold for the VAP. The default value is related to the protocol type. arp:4(pps), nd:8(pps), igmp:4(pps), dhcp:4(pps), dhcpv6:4(pps), mdns:4(pps), other multicast:10(pps), other boradcast:10(pps).

children.name: hwVAPProfileAntiAttackBlacklistSwitch
children.description: This object indicates the status of the VAP anti-attack ARP flood blacklist function. The default value is 1.

children.name: hwWlanLicenseCentralizedTable
children.description: This table is used to get the information of license pool.

children.name: hwAPGroupVapTable
children.description: This table is used to create VAPs in an AP group.

children.name: hwWidsWhitelistProfileSsidTable
children.description: This table is used to configure WIDS SSID whitelists.

children.name: hwWidsWhitelistProfileSsidEntry
children.description: The index of this table is hwWidsWhitelistProfileSsid.

children.name: hwApSysBCMCSuppressionTable
children.description: This table is used to configure ap broadcast and multicast suppression information.

children.name: hwApSysBCMCSuppressionEntry
children.description: The indexes of this table are hwApSystemProfName, hwApSysBCMCSuppressionPktType.

children.name: hwWidsSpoofProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure matching rules for spoof APs.

children.name: hwWidsSpoofProfileEntry
children.description: The indexes of this table are hwWidsSpoofProfileName and hwWidsSpoofSsidRegex.

children.name: hwWidsSpoofProfileRowStatus
children.description: This object indicates the row status of this table. ROWSTATUS_CREATEANDFLOW and ROWSTATUS_DESTROY are commonly used.

children.name: hwNAIRealmProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure and query NAI realm profile parameters.

children.name: hwApProfStationConnectivityDetectStaMacTable
children.description: This table is used to configure Station Connectivity Detect Mac.

children.name: hwApProfStationConnectivityDetectStaMacEntry
children.description: The indexes of this table are hwApSystemProfName and hwApProfStationConnectivityDetectStaMac.

children.name: hwFatApRadioServiceIdxTable
children.description: This table stores information about the Mesh link with the index of 1 on the vehicle-mounted Fat AP and can also be used for subsequent index-based service expansion.

children.name: hwApSystemProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to create or delete an AP system profile and configure AP attributes.

children.name: hwRrmProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure radio resource management parameters, including parameters related to band steering, dynamic load balancing, smart roaming, and UAC.

children.name: hwOperatorNameProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure and query operator name profile parameters.

children.name: hwWlanLoadBalanceStaticGroupTable
children.description: This table records information about the static load balancing group.

children.name: hwCpeProfWlanSliceAclTable
children.description: This table is used to configure wlan-slice cpe-tunnel traffic filter information.

children.name: hwSoftgreProfileTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwSoftgreProfileEntry
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwSoftgreKeepalivePeriod
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwConnectionCapabilityProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure and query connection capability profile parameters.

children.name: hwWlanCountryCodeTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWlanCountryCodeEntry
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWlanCountryCodeAvailableChannelSet2gBW20
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWlanCountryCodeAvailableChannelSet2gBW40Plus
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWlanCountryCodeAvailableChannelSet5gBW80
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWlanNaviACVapTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWlanNaviACLocalTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWdsProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure and query WDS profile parameters.

children.name: hwRegulatoryDomainProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure country codes, calibration channels, and calibration channel bandwidths.

children.name: hwRegulatoryDomainProfileEntry
children.description: The index of this table is hwRegulatoryDomainProfileName.

children.name: hwWlanWideBandEnable
children.description: This object indicates wide band status. The default value is disable.

children.name: hwDcaChannel6GBandwidth
children.description: This object indicates the calibration bandwidth on the 6 GHz frequency band. The default value is auto.

children.name: hwDcaChannel6GChannelSet
children.description: This object indicates the calibration channel set on the 6 GHz frequency band.

children.name: hwUCCProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure and query UCC profile parameters.

children.name: hwUCCProfileEntry
children.description: The index of this table is hwUCCProfileName.

children.name: hwUCCProfLyncVoice8021p
children.description: This object indicates the switch of lync-voice remark 8021p.

children.name: hwUCCProfLyncVoice8021pValue
children.description: This object indicates the value of lync-voice remark 8021p.

children.name: hwUCCProfLyncVideoDscpValue
children.description: This object indicates the value of lync-video remark dscp.

children.name: hwUCCProfLyncShare8021pValue
children.description: This object indicates the value of lync-destop-share remark 8021p.

children.name: hwUCCProfLyncVideoDscp
children.description: This object indicates the switch of lync-video remark dscp.

children.name: hwUCCProfLyncVideo8021p
children.description: This object indicates the switch of lync-video remark 8021p.

children.name: hwUCCProfLyncFileTransferDscpValue
children.description: This object indicates the value of lync-file-transfer remark dscp.

children.name: hwUCCProfLyncFileTransfer8021p
children.description: This object indicates the switch of lync-file-transfer remark 8021p.

children.name: hwUCCProfLyncVideo8021pValue
children.description: This object indicates the value of lync-video remark 8021p.

children.name: hwUCCProfileRowStatus
children.description: This object indicates the row status of this table. ROWSTATUS_CREATEANDFLOW and ROWSTATUS_DESTROY are commonly used.

children.name: hwUCCProfLyncFileTransferDscp
children.description: This object indicates the switch of lync-file-transfer remark dscp.

children.name: hwUCCProfLyncVoiceDscpValue
children.description: This object indicates the value of lync-voice remark dscp.

children.name: hwUCCProfileName
children.description: This object indicates the name of a UCC profile. It is the index of the table.

children.name: hwHotspot2ProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure and query Hotspot2.0 profile parameters.

children.name: hwHotspot2ProfileEntry
children.description: The index of this table is hwHotspot2ProfileName.

children.name: hwHotspot2IPv6AddressAvail
children.description: This object indicates available types of IPv4 addresses. 3 is reserved. The default value 0xFFFFFFFF indicates that no configuration is added.0: Address type not available1: Address type available2: Availability of the address type not known3: Reserved

children.name: hwHotspot2CellularNetworkProfile
children.description: This object indicates the bound cellular network profile. By default, no cellular network profile is bound.

children.name: hwHotspot2ProfileRowStatus
children.description: This object indicates the row status of this table. ROWSTATUS_CREATEANDFLOW and ROWSTATUS_DESTROY are commonly used.ROWSTATUS_UNDEFINED: undefinedROWSTATUS_ACTIVE: activeROWSTATUS_NOTINSERVICE: notInServiceROWSTATUS_NOTREADY: notReadyROWSTATUS_CREATEANDFLOW: createAndGoROWSTATUS_CREATEANDWAIT: createAndWaitROWSTATUS_DESTROY: destroy

children.name: hwHotspot2NetworkAuthenType
children.description: This object indicates the network authentication type. 4 to 255 are reserved. The default value 0xFFFFFFFF indicates that no configuration is added.0: Acceptance of terms and conditions.1: On-line enrollment supported,2: http/https redirection,3: DNS redirection,4 to 255: Reserved

children.name: hwHotspot2IPv4AddressAvail
children.description: This object indicates available types of IPv4 addresses. 8 to 63 are reserved. The default value 0xFFFFFFFF indicates that no configuration is added.0: Address type not available.1: Public IPv4 address available,2: Port-restricted IPv4 address available,3: Single NATed private IPv4 address available,4: Double NATed private IPv4 address available,5: Port-restricted IPv4 address and single NATed IPv4 address available,6: Port-restricted IPv4 address and double NATed IPv4 address available,7: Availability of the address type is not known,8 to 63: Reserved

children.name: hwHotspot2InternetAccess
children.description: This object indicates that the Internet attribute is an interworking information element. This configuration is mandatory. The AP adds this information to Beacon and Probe Response packets, which indicates whether users are allowed to access the Internet, to assist users in discovering and selecting networks. The default value is 2.

children.name: hwHotspot2OperatorNameProfile
children.description: This object indicates the bound operator name profile. By default, no operator name profile is bound.

children.description: Description.

children.description: This object indicates to add or delete mobility groups.

children.description: This object indicates the IPv6 address of the CUC that needs to set up a link with the Master Controller.

children.description: This object indicates the IPv4 address of the CUC that needs to set up a link with the Master Controller.

children.name: hwWlanConnectMasterControllerSwitch
children.description:
This objection indicates the status of the connection between the AC and Master Controller. The establishment of connection between the AC and Master Controller requires the IP address of the Master Controller.
The default value is disconnect(1).

children.name: hwWlanMasterControllerSwitch
children.description:
This object indicates the status of the CUC function.
The default value is disable (1).

children.name: hwTrafficProfileTrafficRemarkTable
children.description: This table is used to configure QoS remark information.

children.description: The indexes of this table are hwAPTrafficProfileName, hwTrafficProfileTrafficRemarkDirection and hwTrafficProfileTrafficRemarkID.

children.name: hwWlanMeshHandoverProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure and query Mesh handover profile parameters.

children.name: hwAPTrafficProfileRateLimitClientTable
children.description: This table is used to configure rate limit information.

children.name: hwAPTrafficProfileRateLimitClientEntry
children.description: The indexes of this table are hwAPTrafficProfileName, hwAPTrafficProfileRateLimitClientDirection and hwAPTrafficProfileRateLimitClientTimeRangeName.

children.name: hwAPTrafficProfileRateLimitClientTimeRangeName
children.description: This object indicates the time range name for rate limit. This parameter has no default value.

children.name: hwAPTrafficProfileRateLimitClientRowStatus
children.description: This object indicates the row status of this table. ROWSTATUS_CREATEANDFLOW and ROWSTATUS_DESTROY are commonly used.

children.description: Description.

children.name: hwAPWiredPortProfileTrafficRemarkEntry
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwAPWiredPortProfileTrafficRemarkIPType
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwIDIndexedAPSpRadioServiceIdxTable
children.description: This table stores information about the Mesh link with the index on the vehicle-mounted AP and can also be used for subsequent index-based service expansion.

children.name: hwIDIndexedAPSpRadioServiceIdxEntry
children.description: Indexes of this table are hwIDIndexedAPSpRadio, hwWlanIDIndexedAPSpApId and hwAPSpRadioServiceIdx.

children.name: hwAPSpServiceIdxSecondChannel
children.description: This object indicates a radio-frequency channel. The value ranges from 42,58,106,122,138,155.

children.name: hwAPSpServiceIdxChannel
children.description: This object indicates a radio-frequency channel. For 2.4G, the value ranges from 1 to 13. For 5G, the value ranges from 36 to 165 (with a separation interval of 4).

children.name: hwAPSpServiceIdxMeshProf
children.description: This object indicates the bound mesh profile.

children.name: hwAPSpServiceIdxRowStatus
children.description: This object indicates the row status of this table. ROWSTATUS_CREATEANDFLOW and ROWSTATUS_DESTROY are commonly used.

children.name: hwWlanGlobalApPassword
children.description: This object indicates passwords for Telnet-based login to APs.

children.name: hwWlanGlobalLocationSourceIPv6Address
children.description: This object indicates the global source IPv6 address for reporting location data in AeroScout or Ekahau location mode. You choose an IPv4 or IPv6 address.

children.name: hwWlanGlobalSpectrumAnalysisSourceIPAddress
children.description: This object indicates the spectrum-analysis source IPv4 address for reporting spectrum-analysis data in spectrum-analysis server. You choose an IPv4 or IPv6 address.

children.name: hwWlanGlobalRogueDeviceLogSwitch
children.description: This object indicates the status of rogue device log switch. The default value is 1. 1: disable 2: enable.

children.name: hwWlanGlobalSpectrumAnalysisSourceIPv6Address
children.description: This object indicates the spectrum-analysis source IPv6 address for reporting spectrum-analysis data in spectrum-analysis server. You choose an IPv4 or IPv6 address.

children.name: hwApContainerDownloadOperate
children.description: This object indicates operation to AP ID or AP group or AP type.

children.name: hwWlanCommitTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwApPwdSetTime
children.description: Get the password set time

children.name: hwApPwdIsExpired
children.description: Query password is expired or not

children.name: hwWlanGlobalBleSourceIPAddress
children.description: This object indicates the global source IPv4 address for reporting ble location data. You choose an IPv4 address.

children.name: hwTestRtCollectOnoff
children.description: This object indicates the status of the real-time collection switch.

children.name: hwWlanGlobalBleSourceIPv6Address
children.description: This object indicates the global source IPv6 address for reporting ble location data. You choose an IPv6 address.

children.name: hwWlanApDataCollectionInterval
children.description: This object indicates the period of caching AP performance. The default value is 15. It is expressed in minutes.

children.name: hwWlanStaDelayOffLineAgingTime
children.description: This object indicates the station delay offline aging time. range(1..86400)

children.name: hwWlanStaDelayOffLineNewStaOnlineSwitch
children.description: This object indicates the switch of station delay offline new station online. 1:disable 2:enable.

children.name: hwWlanStationIpv6Enable
children.description: This object indicates the status of the IPv6 function of users. The default value is 1 . 1: disable 2: enable.

children.name: hwWlanBLELowPowerWarningThreshold
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWlanGlobalApUsername
children.description: This object indicates user names for Telnet-based login to APs.

children.name: hwWlanCPECommandApplyCmd
children.description: This object indicates the CPE command string list, seperated by ';'.

children.name: hwWlanCPECommandApplyAllCpe
children.description: This object indicates apply CPE command to all CPE.

children.name: hwWlanCPECommandApplyApGroup
children.description: This object indicates apply CPE command to CPEs associated to the APs in specified ap-group.

children.name: hwTestApRtCollectCycle
children.description: This object indicates the real-time period of an AC collecting AP performance data.

children.name: hwWlanGlobalApLoadRtuFileName
children.description: This object indicates the AP RTU load file name.

children.name: hwWlanGlobalLocationSourceIPAddress
children.description: This object indicates the global source IPv4 address for reporting location data in AeroScout or Ekahau location mode. You choose an IPv4 or IPv6 address.

children.name: hwWlanBLEMonitorMode
children.description: This object indicates the mode of ble monitor. The default value is 1.

children.name: hwWlanReportStaAssocInfo
children.description: This object indicates the switch of recording user online and offline information in the log. 1:disable 2:enable.

children.name: hwWlanBLEEquipReportInterval
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWlanIotOperateTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwUndoWlanProtectIpAddress
children.description: This object indicates whether to restore the default setting of the IP address of the standby AC.

children.name: hwWlanProtectSwitch
children.description: This object indicates the status of the hot backup function. The default value is 2.

children.name: hwUndoWlanProtectPriority
children.description: This object indicates whether to restore the default setting of the priority of the standby AC.

children.name: hwWlanProtectIpAddress
children.description: This object indicates the IP address of the standby AC.

children.name: hwWlanProtectPriority
children.description: This object indicates the AC priority that determines whether the AC can be selected as the active AC. The default value is 0.

children.name: hwWlanUsernamePasswordApMac
children.description: This object indicates query and setting of MAC addresses of clients logging in to APs.

children.name: hwWlanGlobalAntiInterferencePerPacketTpcSwitch
children.description: This object indicates the status of anti-interference per-packet-TPC switch. The default value is 2. 1: disable 2: enable.

children.name: hwWlanGlobalAeroscoutLocalIPv6
children.description: This object indicates the aeroscout local IPv6 address for receiving message from aeroscout server.

children.name: hwWlanReportStaInfo
children.description: This object indicates the switch of recording user information in the log. 1:disable 2:enable.

children.name: hwWlanLicenseCentralizedRole
children.description: This object indicates the current role of license centralized device.

children.name: hwWlanLicenseCentralizedServerIPv6Addr
children.description: This object indicates the  ipv6 address of license centralized server.

children.name: hwWlanLicenseCentralizedServerIPv4Addr
children.description: This object indicates the  ipv4 address of license centralized server.

children.name: hwTestApNormalCollectCycle
children.description: This object indicates the regular period of an AC collecting AP performance data.

children.name: hwWlanGlobalTemporaryManagementPsk
children.description: This object indicates the global psk of the offline VAP.

children.name: hwHighwayProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure highway profile information.

children.name: hwHighwayApMemberTable
children.description: This table is used to set highway member.

children.name: hw2gRadioProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure 2.4 GHz radio parameters, including physical radio parameters such as channel, power, antenna gain, and working mode, and bind air scan and RRM profiles.

children.name: hw2gRadioProfileEntry
children.description: The index of this table is hw2gRadioProfileName.

children.name: hw2gRadioProfileName
children.description: This object indicates the name of a 2G radio profile. It is the index of the table.

children.name: hw2gRadioChannelSwitchAnnouncementSwitch
children.description: This object indicates the status of the channel switchover announcement function. The default value is 1.

children.name: hw2gRadioAgileAntennaPolarSwitch
children.description: This object indicates the status of the agile antenna polarization. The default value is 1.

children.name: hw2gRadioApEDCABEAIFSN
children.description: This object indicates the EDCA parameter AIFSN, namely, arbitration interframe spacing number, for BE services on APs. The default value is 3.

children.name: hw2gRadioRrmProfile
children.description: This object indicates the bound RRM profile.

children.name: hwCPETunnelProfileTable
children.description: This table is used to configure CPE-Tunnel Profile.

children.name: hwCPETunnelProfileEntry
children.description: The index of this table is hwCPETunnelProfileName.

children.name: hwCPETunnelForwardMode
children.description: This object indicates the forward mode. The default value is tunnel(2).

children.name: hwIoTSerialProfileTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwIoTSerialProfileEntry
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwIoTSerialStopbits
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwIoTSerialFrameLength
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWlanUserDefinedApplicationTable
children.description: This table is used to configure the user defined application.

children.name: hwWlanUserDefinedApplicationEntry
children.description: The index of this table is hwWlanUserDefinedApplicationId.

children.name: hwIoTProfileTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWiredPortProfileTrafficRemarkTable
children.description: This table is used to configure QoS remark information.

children.name: hwWiredPortProfileTrafficRemarkEntry
children.description: The indexes of this table are hwAPWiredPortProfileName, hwWiredPortProfileTrafficRemarkDirection and hwWiredPortProfileTrafficRemarkID.

children.name: hwWlanMeshWhitelistProfileTable
children.description: This table describes the Mesh whitelist profile.

children.name: hwWlanAPProvisionIPv6PrefixLen
children.description: This object indicates the length of the IPv6 address prefix.

children.name: hwWlanAPProvisionIPv4Address
children.description:
This object indicates the AP's IPv4 address.
hwWlanAPProvisionIPv4Address takes effect if hwAPIPv4Method is set to static.

children.name: hwWlanAPProvisionCommitAPMac
children.description: This object indicates that the configuration is delivered based on MAC addresses of APs.

children.name: hwWlanAPProvisionCommitAll
children.description: This object indicates that the configuration is delivered to all APs.

children.name: hwWlanAPProvisionCommitAPName
children.description: This object indicates that the configuration is delivered based on AP names.

children.name: hwWlanAPProvisionIPv6ACList
children.description:
This object indicates the AC IPv6 address list.
NOTE ACL rules are separated by question marks (?).A maximum of four ACL rules can be configured.

children.name: hwWlanAPProvisionGroupName
children.description: This object indicates the group name.

children.name: hwWlanAPProvisionCommitAPId
children.description: This object indicates that the configuration is delivered based on AP ID.

children.name: hwWlanAPProvisionManagementVlan
children.description: This object indicates that the AP management vlan.

children.name: hwWlanAPProvisionName
children.description: This object indicates the name of an AP.

children.name: hwWlanAPProvisionIPv4Mask
children.description:
This object indicates the AP's IPv4 mask.
hwWlanAPProvisionIPv4Mask takes effect if hwAPIPv4Method is set to static.

children.name: hwWlanAPProvisionCommitAPGroup
children.description: This object indicates that the configuration is delivered based on AP groups.

children.name: hwWlanAPProvisionAPMode
children.description: This object indicates the AP mode.

children.name: hwWlanAPProvisionAddressMode
children.description: This object indicates the IPv4 address allocation mode.

children.name: hwAPGroupTable
children.description: This table is used to create or delete AP groups and bind or unbind the AP system profile, 2G radio profile, and domain profile.

children.name: hwAPGroupEntry
children.description: The index of this table is hwAPGroupName.

children.name: hwAPGrpUUIDHex
children.description: This object indicates the UUID Hex value of Group.

children.name: hwAPGrpLocation
children.description: This object indicates the ap location of Group.

children.name: hwAPGrpApNum
children.description: This object indicates the ap numbers of Group.

children.name: hwAPGrpRowStatus
children.description: This object indicates the row status of this table. ROWSTATUS_CREATEANDFLOW and ROWSTATUS_DESTROY are commonly used ?	ROWSTATUS_UNDEFINED: undefined  ROWSTATUS_ACTIVE: active ROWSTATUS_NOTINSERVICE: notInService ?	ROWSTATUS_NOTREADY: notReady ?	ROWSTATUS_CREATEANDFLOW: createAndGo ? ROWSTATUS_CREATEANDWAIT: createAndWait ?	ROWSTATUS_DESTROY: destroy

children.name: hwAPGrpDomainProfile
children.description: This object indicates the domain profile to which AP groups are bound. The default value is default.

children.name: hwAPGrpBleProfile
children.description: This object indicates the bound BLE profile.

children.name: hwAPGrpAPIPVersion
children.description: This object indicates the IP Version of AP.

children.name: hwAPGrpAPSystemProfile
children.description: This object indicates the system profile to which AP groups are bound. The default value is default.
